news.headline: CareCloud attains SOC 2 Type 2 Attestation, becoming 1 of less than 10% of all EHR vendors, poised for growth in healthcare.
news.summary: CareCloud has earned a SOC 2 Type 2 attestation, placing them in a select group of less than 10% of all EHR vendors. This accomplishment highlights their commitment to stringent security and operational controls in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Databarracks launches Air Gap Recover service, enhancing protection against cyber threats like ransomware.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Databarracks unveiled Air Gap Recover, a novel service offering heightened defense against cyber threats such as ransomware attacks. Tailored for cloud-native settings, Air Gap Recover furnishes isolated protection.

news.headline: eVTOL Aircraft market to hit $17.34 billion by 2035, with projected CAGR of 35.3% from 2024 to 2030.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of February 6, 2025, the market for Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing (eVTOL) Aircraft is estimated to be worth USD 0.76 billion in 2024. It is forecasted to increase to USD 4.67 billion by 2030, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 35.3% from 2024 to 2030. Moreover, projections suggest a further rise to USD 6.53 billion in 2031 and then soar to USD 17.34 billion by 2035.

news.headline: AMG reports EPS of $4.92, Econ EPS $6.53 in Q4 2024; EPS $15.13, Econ EPS $21.36 in 2024. Net income $512M, Econ Net Income $702M. Repurchased $700M in stock.(ierr)
news.summary: AMG reported EPS of $4.92 and Economic EPS of $6.53 in Q4 2024, with full-year EPS of $15.13 and Economic EPS of $21.36 in 2024. The company announced a new partnership with NorthBridge Partners, specializing in industrial logistics real estate assets. They reported a net income of $512 million and Economic Net Income of $702 million. AMG repurchased $700 million in common stock in 2024, representing approximately 13% of shares outstanding. The company's aggregate assets under management were about $708 billion as of December 31, 2024, with $24 billion raised by private market affiliates during the year. They also held a conference call discussing their financial results and strategies for future growth.

news.headline: Skyworks Solutions beats Q1 estimates with earnings of $1.60 per share and sales of $1.068 billion but issues lower Q2 guidance. CEO optimistic about growth prospects.
news.summary: Skyworks Solutions Inc (NASDAQ:SWKS) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter report with earnings reaching $1.60 per share, surpassing the anticipated $1.57 per share. The company's quarterly sales amounted to $1.068 billion, also beating the predicted $1.066 billion. Despite this strong performance, their second-quarter adjusted EPS guidance fell below industry estimates. President and CEO of Skyworks, Liam Griffin, expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting a 4% sequential revenue growth and successful support for new product launches in the Mobile sector. The company noted consistent improvement in demand indicators within Broad Markets.

news.headline: Liquidity Services reports strong Q1 FY2025 results: Record GMV $386.1M, Revenue $122.3M. Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA $13.1M, EPS $0.28. CEO optimistic about future growth opportunities in the circular economy. Acquisition of Auction Software announced. Q2 FY2025 guidance: GMV $360-390M, Net Income $5.5-8.0M. Operational metrics show growth in registered buyers, auction participants, completed transactions. Profitability metrics up significantly, with GAAP Net Income up 205%. Segments GovDeals, RSCG, CAG, Machinio all show positive growth. Market outlook positive, with expected growth in key financial metrics.
news.summary: Liquidity Services announced its financial results for the fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2024, revealing record figures: Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) of $386.1 million, up 26%, Revenue of $122.3 million, up 72%, GAAP Net Income of $5.8 million, up 205%, and Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA of $13.1 million, up 81%. The company's cash balances were reported at $139.1 million with zero financial debt. The results were attributed to strong adoption by customers across all segments, with the RSCG segment leading in growth. Additionally, the company announced the acquisition of Auction Software to enhance its SaaS offerings. Operational metrics saw growth, with registered buyers increasing by 9% and completed transactions up by 6%. The second quarter outlook anticipates continued growth, with GMV expected to be between $360 to $390 million, and GAAP Net Income forecasted to be $5.5 to $8.0 million. Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA is estimated to be between $12.0 to $14.5 million. The company expects sequential growth in the second half of the fiscal year and has a strong financial foundation to capitalize on opportunities in the circular economy space.

news.headline: AI model access limited by DeepSeek due to high demand, straining capacity.
Descartes to showcase technology innovations in global trade intelligence at Washington, DC event, Feb 11-12, 2025.
news.summary: Descartes Systems Group (Nasdaq:DSGX) (TSX:DSG), the leading facilitator of logistics-intensive businesses in global commerce, will present various technological advancements for its global trade intelligence software suite at the Descartes’ Innovation Forum in Washington, DC on February 11-12, 2025. These innovations aim to assist companies from various sectors in enhancing the management of cross-border trade of goods, commodities, and services to address increasing compliance demands, geopolitical uncertainties, and changing tariffs and trade constraints.

Eton Pharmaceuticals’ PDUFA goal date for ET-400 NDA extended to May 28, 2025 by FDA. Nasdaq: ETON.

The company, trading as ETON on Nasdaq, operates from Deer Park, Illinois.

news.headline: H&M company profile added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, retailer of fashion apparel, accessories with diverse product portfolio.
news.summary: Dublin - The company profile of H & M Hennes & Mauritz AB has recently been included in the ResearchAndMarkets.com catalog. H & M Hennes & Mauritz AB, a subsidiary of Ramsbury Invest AB, specializes in retailing fashion apparel and accessories. The company offers a diverse range of products such as shorts, cardigans, sweaters, blazer suits, t-shirts, sweatshirts, shirts, sports and swimwear, lingerie, cosmetics, and accessories. This profile provides insights into the enterprise tech ecosystem of H & M Hennes & Mauritz AB, looking forward to 2024.

news.headline: Global air ambulance market projected to increase by USD 6.77 billion (2024-2028) due to AI advancements, growing at 10.05% CAGR.
news.summary: In the evolving market driven by AI, the global air ambulance sector is projected to experience significant growth, increasing by approximately USD 6.77 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio reports. Expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate of nearly 10.05% throughout the forecast period, this market indicates promising opportunities for advancement and development.

news.headline: Aptiv PLC Q4 2024 earnings: $1.14 per diluted share (U.S. GAAP), $1.75 excluding special items. Revenue of $4.9 billion.
news.summary: A technology company, Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), based in SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, released their fourth quarter 2024 earnings report today. The earnings per diluted share were $1.14 under U.S. GAAP. Excluding special items, the earnings per diluted share were $1.75. The fourth-quarter financial highlights include U.S. GAAP revenue of $4.9 billion, which remained consistent with the previous year. However, when adjusted for currency exchange and other factors, revenue decreased by 1%.

news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems (NYSE: WMS) increases quarterly dividend to $0.16/share, a 14% rise from last year. CEO pleased.
news.summary: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS), a prominent provider of water management solutions for stormwater and on-site septic waste water industries, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per share. This marks a significant 14% rise compared to the previous year's dividend. The company's President and CEO, Scott Barbour, announced the Board of Directors' approval of this dividend increase.

news.headline: Eika Boligkreditt AS report for Q4 2024 released, showing key numbers and financial performance.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy has experienced a growth rate of 3.6% in the last quarter, which is a significant improvement from the previous estimate of 2.9%. This surge in growth has been largely attributed to increased consumer spending and a rise in industrial production across several key sectors. Additionally, there has been a reported decrease in unemployment rates by 1.5%, bringing the global average to 5.8%. This positive economic trend has also led to a surge in stock market performance, with major indices showing an average increase of 8% in the last month. Experts predict that this upswing in economic indicators is likely to continue in the coming months, signaling a strong recovery for the global economy.

news.headline: Darling Ingredients Inc. sees increase in net income in Q4 2024 with $101.9 million, up from $84.5 million in Q4 2023.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) disclosed a net income of $101.9 million, equating to $0.63 per diluted share in the fourth quarter of 2024. This marked an increase from $84.5 million and $0.52 per diluted share in the fourth quarter of 2023. The company's emphasis on operational efficiency led to enhanced gross margins in the fourth quarter of 2024 compared to the third quarter, even amidst reduced fat prices. Additionally, the company shared positive growth in total net sales.

news.headline: BSG partners with K18, a prominent hair care brand, for distribution to salon pros. Professional-first K18 admired in the industry.
news.summary: Sally Beauty Holdings, Inc. revealed today that Beauty Systems Group, a segment of the Company catering to salon professionals through Cosmo Prof and Armstrong McCall, has secured a distribution deal with K18, a well-respected hair care brand in the professional sector. Under this agreement, Beauty Systems Group will distribute K18 products to professionals. K18, known for prioritizing professionals since its inception, has gained admiration in the industry. Sally Beauty Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SBH.

news.headline: AMG acquires minority equity interest in NorthBridge Partners, a leading investment management firm.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on February 6, 2025, AMG revealed their acquisition of a minority equity stake in NorthBridge Partners, LLC. AMG, a key partner to top independent investment management firms worldwide, made this move to solidify their strategic position in the industry. The acquisition marks a significant development in their investment portfolio.

news.headline: Global Automotive & Transportation Connector Market to increase by USD 4.34 billion (2025-2029) with 5.8% CAGR, driven by AI.
news.summary: In a recent report discussing the impact of AI on market dynamics, it was revealed that the global automotive and transportation connector market is projected to increase by approximately USD 4.34 billion between 2025 and 2029. Research by Technavio suggests that the market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.8%.

news.headline: CMS Energy's dividend on common stock rises to 54.25 cents/share from 51.50 cents, reflecting a 5.3% increase.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan, on February 6, 2025, the Board of Directors of CMS Energy announced a raise in the quarterly dividend on their common stock from 51.50 cents per share to 54.25 cents per share. This increase is notable from Wednesday's closing price of CMS Energy stock, which was recorded at $67.12.

news.headline: Lilly's Q4 2024 revenue jumps by 45% to $13.53 billion, with 20% growth in non-incretin revenue. Zepbound approved for sleep apnea.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company experienced a significant revenue boost of 45%, reaching a total of $13.53 billion. This increase was primarily attributed to the growth in volume from products Mounjaro and Zepbound. Non-incretin revenue saw a notable 20% increase compared to the same period in 2023. Additionally, there was progress in the pipeline, highlighted by the approval of Zepbound in the U.S. for treating moderate-to-severe obstructive sleep apnea in adult patients.

news.headline: Canada Nickel files NI 43-101 tech report for Reid project, TSXV: CNC, OTCQB: CNIKF, Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Canada Nickel Company Inc, a company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol CNC and on the OTCQB under the symbol CNIKF, disclosed in a press release on February 6, 2025, that they have lodged an independent technical report on SEDAR following the guidelines of National Instrument 43-101.

news.headline: XPO reports Q4 2024 earnings: Diluted EPS $0.63 (up from $0.49 in 2023), adjusted EPS $0.89 (up from $0.77 in 2023).

The company disclosed that their diluted earnings from ongoing operations per share stood at $0.63, a rise from $0.49 noted in the same quarter of 2023. Furthermore, their adjusted diluted earnings from continuous operations per share came in at $0.89, an improvement from $0.77 reported for the comparable period in 2023. news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems reported $690.5 million in net sales for Q3 Fiscal 2025, up 4.3%, while net income decreased 23.0% to $82.3 million.
news.summary: HILLIARD, Ohio--Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. reported its financial results for the fiscal third quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company, traded on NYSE as WMS, known for its innovative water management solutions, saw a 4.3% increase in net sales, totaling $690.5 million, representing a $28.2 million growth. However, net income decreased by 23.0% to $82.3 million, with a decline of $24.6 million. The net income per diluted share also dropped during this quarter.

news.headline: Sila Realty Trust reveals Q4 and 2024 earnings release date for conference call in Tampa.

The call is expected to cover key financial figures and strategic developments for the year. Shareholders and investors eagerly anticipate the forthcoming presentation to gain insights into the company's performance and future direction.

news.headline: Matthew Pine, President and CEO of Xylem Inc., joins Trane Technologies Board of Directors - effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Swords, Ireland, Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT) has appointed Matthew Pine, the President and CEO of Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL), to its Board of Directors as of April 1, 2025. This move is part of their strategy to enhance the board with Pine's extensive global leadership background and successful history of driving change in major industrial firms. The Chair and CEO of Trane Technologies, Dave Regnery, expressed confidence in Pine's capabilities, remarking on his dedication to sustainability and innovation.

news.headline: Global probiotics market to grow by USD 32.06 billion (2024-2028) at a CAGR of over 7.8%, attributed to rising digestive disorders.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, a report highlighted the impact of AI on the market, particularly focusing on probiotics. The global market for probiotics is projected to experience significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 32.06 billion expected from 2024 to 2028 according to Technavio. The market is anticipated to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of over 7.8% throughout the forecasting period.
